title: Exploring Dublin City Map
description: Explore Dublin's famous sights on this interactive map. Click on the landmarks to learn about them, then test your knowledge in Quiz Mode!

hotspots.popupText: The Spire: A massive 120-meter high stainless steel needle monument erected on O'Connell Street in 2003.
hotspots.label: the spire

hotspots.popupText: Trinity College: Established in 1592, it is the oldest university in Ireland and holds the famous Book of Kells.
hotspots.label: trinity college

hotspots.popupText: Dublin Castle: Dating back to 1204, this historic castle was once the seat of British administration in Ireland.
hotspots.label: dublin castle

hotspots.popupText: Temple Bar: A lively cobbled-street area full of traditional music, pubs, galleries, and street artists.
hotspots.label: temple bar

challenges.promptText: Find the oldest university in Ireland, which was established in 1592.
Find the lively cobbled-street quarter known for traditional Irish music and pubs.
Find the massive 120-meter high stainless steel needle monument.
Find the historic stone fortress dating back to 1204, once the seat of power.
